primary_thread:
🔥 GitHub Trending #1: Agency Agents

⭐ 15950 stars
📈 连续4天登顶GitHub Trending

This AI Agency framework is changing how we build autonomous systems.

Complete breakdown 👇

What is Agency Agents?

GitHub: https://github.com/mirofish/agency-agents

AI Agency模式，群体智能范式

Key features:
✅ Multi-agent collaboration
✅ Autonomous task execution
✅ Production-ready
✅ Open source

Why it's trending:

The AI Agency pattern is emerging as the next evolution:

1. Single Agent → Limited scope
2. Multi-Agent → Collaboration
3. Agency → Full autonomy

This framework enables level 3.

Technical highlights:

• Swarm intelligence architecture
• Dynamic task delegation
• Fault-tolerant design
• Extensible agent system

Built for real-world deployment.

Use cases:

✅ Automated research teams
✅ Content production agencies
✅ Software development teams
✅ Data processing pipelines

Any workflow with multiple steps.

Comparison with OpenClaw:

Agency Agents: Multi-agent orchestration
OpenClaw: Skill-based automation

They're complementary:
• Use OpenClaw for individual tasks
• Use Agency Agents for coordination

Best of both worlds.

Getting started:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/mirofish/agency-agents
cd agency-agents
pip install -r requirements.txt
python examples/basic_agency.py
```

5 minutes to first agent.

Community:

• 15950+ stars in 4 days
• Active Discord community
• Regular updates
• Production users

Early but promising.

My take:

This is the direction AI is heading:
From tools → agents → agencies

Worth watching closely.

GitHub: https://github.com/mirofish/agency-agents

#AI #Agents #OpenSource #GitHubTrending #AgencyAI
skill_thread:
🛠️ OpenClaw Skill Spotlight:
App Store Screenshots

Auto-generate professional App Store screenshots
Quality score: 100/100

Perfect for indie developers 👇

The problem:

Creating App Store screenshots is tedious:
• Multiple device sizes
• Localization requirements
• Design consistency
• Time consuming

This Skill automates it all.

What it does:

✅ Auto-captures app screens
✅ Applies device frames
✅ Adds text overlays
✅ Generates all sizes
✅ Exports for all locales

One command, complete assets.

Usage:

```bash
openclaw run app-store-screenshots \
  --app-path ./MyApp.app \
  --devices iPhone15,iPadPro \
  --locales en,zh,ja
```

That's it. Screenshots ready.

Results:

⏱️ Time saved: 3-4 hours
📱 Devices: All supported
🌍 Locales: Auto-generated
🎨 Quality: Professional

Cost: $0 (included in OpenClaw)

Perfect for:

✅ Indie developers
✅ App agencies
✅ Frequent updaters
✅ Multi-language apps

Try it: openclaw skill install app-store-screenshots

#OpenClaw #AppDev #IndieDev #Automation
